name: Rob Mounsey
abstract: Rob Mounsey (born December 2, 1952) is an American musician, composer, and arranger.

interviews.title: Rob Mounsey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 9, 2025

concerts.label: Idina Menzel, Singer
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: This is written by me and Rob Mounsey... I said, Rob, write a bridge, I’ll give you co-composer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Abene
about_quotes.evidence: Guys like Rob Mounsey, who is an excellent musician... Rob Mounsey did a wonderful record with Eddie Daniels for GRP
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Abene interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003
